title: Fix "Error: no such container"
body:
When executing podman logs as root, I get only "Error: no such container".

```bash
$ sudo podman logs --latest
Error: no such container
$ podman logs --latest
(snip)
[Sun Oct 25 16:38:59.076398 2020] [ssl:warn] [pid 1:tid 140704353533312] AH01882: Init: this version of mod_ssl was compiled against a newer library (OpenSSL 1.1.1b FIPS  26 Feb 2019, version currently loaded is OpenSSL 1.1.1 FIPS  11 Sep 2018) - may result in undefined or erroneous behavior
(snip)
```

We need to either remove all use of sudo (and mark the checkport/restore section of the tutorial as "root only") or re-add it and direct folks to the dedicated rootless tutorial; the current state of the turotial is basically unusable.
